content.content:
1→# Dataview Query Library
     2→
     3→> Ready-to-use Dataview queries for common use cases. Copy, paste, and customize for your vault.
     4→
     5→---
     6→
     7→## Query Basics
     8→
     9→### Query Types
    10→
    11→| Type | Purpose | Output |
    12→|------|---------|--------|
    13→| `LIST` | Simple list | Bullet points |
    14→| `TABLE` | Structured data | Columns |
    15→| `TASK` | Task aggregation | Checkboxes |
    16→| `CALENDAR` | Date visualization | Calendar grid |
    17→
    18→### Basic Syntax
    19→
    20→```dataview
    21→QUERY_TYPE [fields]
    22→FROM [source]
    23→WHERE [condition]
    24→SORT [field] [ASC/DESC]
    25→LIMIT [number]
    26→GROUP BY [field]
    27→FLATTEN [field]
    28→```
    29→
    30→---
    31→
    32→## Project Queries
    33→
    34→### All Projects with Status
    35→
    36→```dataview
    37→TABLE
    38→  status as "Status",
    39→  priority as "Priority",
    40→  tech-stack as "Stack"
    41→FROM "Projects"
    42→WHERE type = "project"
    43→SORT priority ASC
    44→```
    45→
    46→### Active Projects Only
    47→
    48→```dataview
    49→TABLE
    50→  status as "Status",
    51→  live-url as "URL"
    52→FROM "Projects"
    53→WHERE type = "project" AND status = "active"
    54→SORT file.mtime DESC
    55→```
    56→
    57→### Projects by Priority
    58→
    59→```dataview
    60→TABLE WITHOUT ID
    61→  file.link as "Project",
    62→  status as "Status"
    63→FROM "Projects"
    64→WHERE type = "project"
    65→GROUP BY priority
    66→```
    67→
    68→### Recently Updated Projects
    69→
    70→```dataview
    71→TABLE
    72→  status as "Status",
    73→  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd") as "Modified"
    74→FROM "Projects"
    75→WHERE type = "project"
    76→SORT file.mtime DESC
    77→LIMIT 5
    78→```
    79→
    80→---
    81→
    82→## Task Queries
    83→
    84→### All Open Tasks
    85→
    86→```dataview
    87→TASK
    88→FROM "Projects" OR "Journal"
    89→WHERE !completed
    90→SORT file.mtime DESC
    91→```
    92→
    93→### Tasks Due This Week
    94→
    95→```dataview
    96→TASK
    97→WHERE !completed AND due >= date(today) AND due <= date(today) + dur(7 days)
    98→SORT due ASC
    99→```
   100→
   101→### Overdue Tasks
   102→
   103→```dataview
   104→TASK
   105→WHERE !completed AND due < date(today)
   106→SORT due ASC
   107→```
   108→
   109→### High Priority Tasks (P0)
   110→
   111→```dataview
   112→TASK
   113→FROM ""
   114→WHERE !completed AND contains(text, "P0") OR contains(text, "⏫")
   115→```
   116→
   117→### Tasks by Project
   118→
   119→```dataview
   120→TASK
   121→FROM "Projects/Neuman Brain"
   122→WHERE !completed
   123→GROUP BY file.link
   124→```
   125→
   126→### Completed Today
   127→
   128→```dataview
   129→TASK
   130→WHERE completed AND completion = date(today)
   131→```
   132→
   133→---
   134→
   135→## Journal Queries
   136→
   137→### Recent Journal Entries
   138→
   139→```dataview
   140→LIST
   141→FROM "Journal"
   142→WHERE file.day
   143→SORT file.day DESC
   144→LIMIT 10
   145→```
   146→
   147→### Journal Entries This Month
   148→
   149→```dataview
   150→TABLE WITHOUT ID
   151→  file.link as "Day",
   152→  file.size as "Size"
   153→FROM "Journal"
   154→WHERE file.day.month = date(today).month AND file.day.year = date(today).year
   155→SORT file.day DESC
   156→```
   157→
   158→### Journal with Specific Tag
   159→
   160→```dataview
   161→LIST
   162→FROM "Journal"
   163→WHERE contains(file.tags, "#reflection")
   164→SORT file.day DESC
   165→```
   166→
   167→---
   168→
   169→## Concept/Wiki Queries
   170→
   171→### All Concepts
   172→
   173→```dataview
   174→TABLE WITHOUT ID
   175→  file.link as "Concept",
   176→  length(file.inlinks) as "Backlinks"
   177→FROM "Concepts"
   178→SORT length(file.inlinks) DESC
   179→```
   180→
   181→### Most Referenced Concepts
   182→
   183→```dataview
   184→TABLE WITHOUT ID
   185→  file.link as "Concept",
   186→  length(file.inlinks) as "References"
   187→FROM "Concepts"
   188→WHERE length(file.inlinks) > 2
   189→SORT length(file.inlinks) DESC
   190→LIMIT 10
   191→```
   192→
   193→### Orphan Concepts (No Backlinks)
   194→
   195→```dataview
   196→LIST
   197→FROM "Concepts"
   198→WHERE length(file.inlinks) = 0
   199→```
   200→
   201→### Concepts by Tag
   202→
   203→```dataview
   204→LIST
   205→FROM "Concepts"
   206→WHERE contains(file.tags, "#frontend")
   207→```
   208→
   209→---
   210→
   211→## Decision (ADR) Queries
   212→
   213→### All Decisions
   214→
   215→```dataview
   216→TABLE
   217→  status as "Status",
   218→  date as "Date"
   219→FROM "Decisions"
   220→SORT date DESC
   221→```
   222→
   223→### Accepted Decisions
   224→
   225→```dataview
   226→TABLE
   227→  date as "Date",
   228→  file.link as "Decision"
   229→FROM "Decisions"
   230→WHERE status = "accepted"
   231→SORT date DESC
   232→```
   233→
   234→### Decisions by Project
   235→
   236→```dataview
   237→LIST
   238→FROM "Decisions"
   239→WHERE contains(file.name, "LZG")
   240→```
   241→
   242→---
   243→
   244→## File Management Queries
   245→
   246→### Recently Modified Files
   247→
   248→```dataview
   249→TABLE
   250→  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm") as "Modified",
   251→  file.folder as "Folder"
   252→FROM ""
   253→WHERE file.name != "Home"
   254→SORT file.mtime DESC
   255→LIMIT 15
   256→```
   257→
   258→### Largest Files
   259→
   260→```dataview
   261→TABLE
   262→  round(file.size / 1000, 2) + " KB" as "Size",
   263→  file.folder as "Folder"
   264→FROM ""
   265→SORT file.size DESC
   266→LIMIT 10
   267→```
   268→
   269→### Files Without Tags
   270→
   271→```dataview
   272→LIST
   273→FROM "Projects" OR "Concepts"
   274→WHERE length(file.tags) = 0
   275→```
   276→
   277→### Files Created Today
   278→
   279→```dataview
   280→LIST
   281→FROM ""
   282→WHERE file.cday = date(today)
   283→```
   284→
   285→### Stale Files (Not Modified in 30 Days)
   286→
   287→```dataview
   288→TABLE
   289→  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd") as "Last Modified"
   290→FROM "Projects"
   291→WHERE file.mtime < date(today) - dur(30 days)
   292→SORT file.mtime ASC
   293→```
   294→
   295→---
   296→
   297→## Snippet Queries
   298→
   299→### All Code Snippets
   300→
   301→```dataview
   302→TABLE
   303→  language as "Language",
   304→  length(file.inlinks) as "Uses"
   305→FROM "Snippets"
   306→SORT language ASC
   307→```
   308→
   309→### Python Snippets
   310→
   311→```dataview
   312→LIST
   313→FROM "Snippets"
   314→WHERE language = "python" OR contains(file.tags, "#python")
   315→```
   316→
   317→---
   318→
   319→## Calendar Queries
   320→
   321→### Calendar View of Journal
   322→
   323→```dataview
   324→CALENDAR file.day
   325→FROM "Journal"
   326→```
   327→
   328→### Calendar of Due Dates
   329→
   330→```dataview
   331→CALENDAR due
   332→FROM ""
   333→WHERE due
   334→```
   335→
   336→---
   337→
   338→## Inline Queries
   339→
   340→Use these inline for dynamic content within notes.
   341→
   342→### Current File Info
   343→
   344→```markdown
   345→Last modified: `= this.file.mtime`
   346→Created: `= this.file.ctime`
   347→Word count: `= length(this.file.content)`
   348→```
   349→
   350→### Metadata Display
   351→
   352→```markdown
   353→Status: `= this.status`
   354→Priority: `= this.priority`
   355→Updated: `= this.updated`
   356→```
   357→
   358→### Link Count
   359→
   360→```markdown
   361→This note has `= length(this.file.inlinks)` backlinks.
   362→```
   363→
   364→### Days Since Created
   365→
   366→```markdown
   367→Created `= (date(today) - this.file.cday).days` days ago.
   368→```
   369→
   370→---
   371→
   372→## DataviewJS Examples
   373→
   374→For complex queries requiring JavaScript.
   375→
   376→### Project Health Dashboard
   377→
   378→```dataviewjs
   379→const projects = dv.pages('"Projects"')
   380→  .where(p => p.type === "project");
   381→
   382→const healthy = projects.filter(p => {
   383→  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
   384→  return daysSinceUpdate < 7;
   385→});
   386→
   387→const stale = projects.filter(p => {
   388→  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
   389→  return daysSinceUpdate >= 7 && daysSinceUpdate < 30;
   390→});
   391→
   392→const rotting = projects.filter(p => {
   393→  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
   394→  return daysSinceUpdate >= 30;
   395→});
   396→
   397→dv.paragraph(`🟢 Fresh: ${healthy.length} | 🟡 Stale: ${stale.length} | 🔴 Rotting: ${rotting.length}`);
   398→```
   399→
   400→### Task Statistics
   401→
   402→```dataviewjs
   403→const tasks = dv.pages().file.tasks;
   404→const completed = tasks.where(t => t.completed).length;
   405→const open = tasks.where(t => !t.completed).length;
   406→const overdue = tasks.where(t => !t.completed && t.due && t.due < dv.date("today")).length;
   407→
   408→dv.paragraph(`📊 Tasks: ${open} open, ${completed} completed, ${overdue} overdue`);
   409→```
   410→
   411→### Recent Activity Timeline
   412→
   413→```dataviewjs
   414→const recentFiles = dv.pages()
   415→  .sort(p => p.file.mtime, 'desc')
   416→  .limit(10);
   417→
   418→for (let file of recentFiles) {
   419→  const timeAgo = Math.round((Date.now() - file.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
   420→  dv.paragraph(`${file.file.link} - ${timeAgo}h ago`);
   421→}
   422→```
   423→
   424→---
   425→
   426→## Query Patterns
   427→
   428→### Filtering Patterns
   429→
   430→```
   431→// Contains text
   432→WHERE contains(field, "value")
   433→
   434→// Starts with
   435→WHERE startswith(field, "prefix")
   436→
   437→// Multiple conditions
   438→WHERE condition1 AND condition2
   439→WHERE condition1 OR condition2
   440→
   441→// Negation
   442→WHERE !completed
   443→WHERE field != "value"
   444→
   445→// Date comparisons
   446→WHERE date >= date(today)
   447→WHERE date < date(today) - dur(7 days)
   448→
   449→// Array contains
   450→WHERE contains(tags, "#important")
   451→WHERE contains(file.tags, "project")
   452→```
   453→
   454→### Formatting Patterns
   455→
   456→```
   457→// Date formatting
   458→dateformat(date, "yyyy-MM-dd")
   459→dateformat(date, "MMMM dd, yyyy")
   460→
   461→// Number formatting
   462→round(number, 2)
   463→
   464→// String operations
   465→upper(text)
   466→lower(text)

# Dataview Query Library

> Ready-to-use Dataview queries for common use cases. Copy, paste, and customize for your vault.

---

## Query Basics

### Query Types

| Type | Purpose | Output |
|------|---------|--------|
| `LIST` | Simple list | Bullet points |
| `TABLE` | Structured data | Columns |
| `TASK` | Task aggregation | Checkboxes |
| `CALENDAR` | Date visualization | Calendar grid |

### Basic Syntax

```dataview
QUERY_TYPE [fields]
FROM [source]
WHERE [condition]
SORT [field] [ASC/DESC]
LIMIT [number]
GROUP BY [field]
FLATTEN [field]
```

---

## Project Queries

### All Projects with Status

```dataview
TABLE
  status as "Status",
  priority as "Priority",
  tech-stack as "Stack"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
SORT priority ASC
```

### Active Projects Only

```dataview
TABLE
  status as "Status",
  live-url as "URL"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project" AND status = "active"
SORT file.mtime DESC
```

### Projects by Priority

```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Project",
  status as "Status"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
GROUP BY priority
```

### Recently Updated Projects

```dataview
TABLE
  status as "Status",
  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd") as "Modified"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
SORT file.mtime DESC
LIMIT 5
```

---

## Task Queries

### All Open Tasks

```dataview
TASK
FROM "Projects" OR "Journal"
WHERE !completed
SORT file.mtime DESC
```

### Tasks Due This Week

```dataview
TASK
WHERE !completed AND due >= date(today) AND due <= date(today) + dur(7 days)
SORT due ASC
```

### Overdue Tasks

```dataview
TASK
WHERE !completed AND due < date(today)
SORT due ASC
```

### High Priority Tasks (P0)

```dataview
TASK
FROM ""
WHERE !completed AND contains(text, "P0") OR contains(text, "⏫")
```

### Tasks by Project

```dataview
TASK
FROM "Projects/Neuman Brain"
WHERE !completed
GROUP BY file.link
```

### Completed Today

```dataview
TASK
WHERE completed AND completion = date(today)
```

---

## Journal Queries

### Recent Journal Entries

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Journal"
WHERE file.day
SORT file.day DESC
LIMIT 10
```

### Journal Entries This Month

```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Day",
  file.size as "Size"
FROM "Journal"
WHERE file.day.month = date(today).month AND file.day.year = date(today).year
SORT file.day DESC
```

### Journal with Specific Tag

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Journal"
WHERE contains(file.tags, "#reflection")
SORT file.day DESC
```

---

## Concept/Wiki Queries

### All Concepts

```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Concept",
  length(file.inlinks) as "Backlinks"
FROM "Concepts"
SORT length(file.inlinks) DESC
```

### Most Referenced Concepts

```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Concept",
  length(file.inlinks) as "References"
FROM "Concepts"
WHERE length(file.inlinks) > 2
SORT length(file.inlinks) DESC
LIMIT 10
```

### Orphan Concepts (No Backlinks)

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Concepts"
WHERE length(file.inlinks) = 0
```

### Concepts by Tag

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Concepts"
WHERE contains(file.tags, "#frontend")
```

---

## Decision (ADR) Queries

### All Decisions

```dataview
TABLE
  status as "Status",
  date as "Date"
FROM "Decisions"
SORT date DESC
```

### Accepted Decisions

```dataview
TABLE
  date as "Date",
  file.link as "Decision"
FROM "Decisions"
WHERE status = "accepted"
SORT date DESC
```

### Decisions by Project

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Decisions"
WHERE contains(file.name, "LZG")
```

---

## File Management Queries

### Recently Modified Files

```dataview
TABLE
  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm") as "Modified",
  file.folder as "Folder"
FROM ""
WHERE file.name != "Home"
SORT file.mtime DESC
LIMIT 15
```

### Largest Files

```dataview
TABLE
  round(file.size / 1000, 2) + " KB" as "Size",
  file.folder as "Folder"
FROM ""
SORT file.size DESC
LIMIT 10
```

### Files Without Tags

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Projects" OR "Concepts"
WHERE length(file.tags) = 0
```

### Files Created Today

```dataview
LIST
FROM ""
WHERE file.cday = date(today)
```

### Stale Files (Not Modified in 30 Days)

```dataview
TABLE
  dateformat(file.mtime, "yyyy-MM-dd") as "Last Modified"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE file.mtime < date(today) - dur(30 days)
SORT file.mtime ASC
```

---

## Snippet Queries

### All Code Snippets

```dataview
TABLE
  language as "Language",
  length(file.inlinks) as "Uses"
FROM "Snippets"
SORT language ASC
```

### Python Snippets

```dataview
LIST
FROM "Snippets"
WHERE language = "python" OR contains(file.tags, "#python")
```

---

## Calendar Queries

### Calendar View of Journal

```dataview
CALENDAR file.day
FROM "Journal"
```

### Calendar of Due Dates

```dataview
CALENDAR due
FROM ""
WHERE due
```

---

## Inline Queries

Use these inline for dynamic content within notes.

### Current File Info

```markdown
Last modified: `= this.file.mtime`
Created: `= this.file.ctime`
Word count: `= length(this.file.content)`
```

### Metadata Display

```markdown
Status: `= this.status`
Priority: `= this.priority`
Updated: `= this.updated`
```

### Link Count

```markdown
This note has `= length(this.file.inlinks)` backlinks.
```

### Days Since Created

```markdown
Created `= (date(today) - this.file.cday).days` days ago.
```

---

## DataviewJS Examples

For complex queries requiring JavaScript.

### Project Health Dashboard

```dataviewjs
const projects = dv.pages('"Projects"')
  .where(p => p.type === "project");

const healthy = projects.filter(p => {
  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
  return daysSinceUpdate < 7;
});

const stale = projects.filter(p => {
  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
  return daysSinceUpdate >= 7 && daysSinceUpdate < 30;
});

const rotting = projects.filter(p => {
  const daysSinceUpdate = (Date.now() - p.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24);
  return daysSinceUpdate >= 30;
});

dv.paragraph(`🟢 Fresh: ${healthy.length} | 🟡 Stale: ${stale.length} | 🔴 Rotting: ${rotting.length}`);
```

### Task Statistics

```dataviewjs
const tasks = dv.pages().file.tasks;
const completed = tasks.where(t => t.completed).length;
const open = tasks.where(t => !t.completed).length;
const overdue = tasks.where(t => !t.completed && t.due && t.due < dv.date("today")).length;

dv.paragraph(`📊 Tasks: ${open} open, ${completed} completed, ${overdue} overdue`);
```

### Recent Activity Timeline

```dataviewjs
const recentFiles = dv.pages()
  .sort(p => p.file.mtime, 'desc')
  .limit(10);

for (let file of recentFiles) {
  const timeAgo = Math.round((Date.now() - file.file.mtime) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  dv.paragraph(`${file.file.link} - ${timeAgo}h ago`);
}
```

---

## Query Patterns

### Filtering Patterns

```
// Contains text
WHERE contains(field, "value")

// Starts with
WHERE startswith(field, "prefix")

// Multiple conditions
WHERE condition1 AND condition2
WHERE condition1 OR condition2

// Negation
WHERE !completed
WHERE field != "value"

// Date comparisons
WHERE date >= date(today)
WHERE date < date(today) - dur(7 days)

// Array contains
WHERE contains(tags, "#important")
WHERE contains(file.tags, "project")
```

### Formatting Patterns

```
// Date formatting
dateformat(date, "yyyy-MM-dd")
dateformat(date, "MMMM dd, yyyy")

// Number formatting
round(number, 2)

// String operations
upper(text)
lower(text)
length(text)

// Null handling
default(field, "N/A")
```

---

## Performance Tips

1. **Use `FROM` to limit scope**: Always specify source folders
2. **Add `LIMIT`**: Especially for large vaults
3. **Avoid `FROM ""`**: Queries entire vault
4. **Use specific fields**: Don't select `*`
5. **Minimize DataviewJS**: DQL is faster

### Example: Optimized Query

```dataview
// SLOW
TABLE * FROM "" WHERE type = "project"

// FAST
TABLE status, priority
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
LIMIT 20
```

---

## Resources

- [Dataview Documentation](https://blacksmithgu.github.io/obsidian-dataview/)
- [Dataview Example Vault](https://github.com/s-blu/obsidian_dataview_example_vault)
- [Dataview Query Wizard GPT](https://www.obsidianstats.com/posts/2025-04-10-obsidian-dataview-query-wizard)

---

*Last updated: 2025-12-14*

Perfect! Now let me compile my comprehensive analysis. Based on my exploration, I have a complete picture of all Dataview and DataviewJS queries in the vault.

## Comprehensive Dataview & DataviewJS Query Analysis

### Overview
I've identified **32 distinct Dataview/DataviewJS queries** across 22 markdown files in the `_meta.notes` vault, ranging from basic LIST queries to advanced DataviewJS implementations.

---

## PART 1: All Existing Queries

### **Dashboard Queries (9 queries)**

#### 1. Active Projects - Recent Activity
- **Location**: `Dashboards/Active Projects.md`
- **Type**: Basic Dataview TABLE
- **Complexity**: Basic
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE updated as "Last Updated"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
SORT updated desc
LIMIT 10
```
- **Purpose**: Show recently updated projects
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 2. Project Health - Debt Metrics
- **Location**: `Dashboards/Project Health.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE with FLATTEN
- **Complexity**: Intermediate
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE length(rows) as "Debt Items"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE file.tasks
FLATTEN file.tasks as task
WHERE contains(task.tags, "#debt")
GROUP BY file.link
```
- **Purpose**: Count task-based debt items by project
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (uses task.tags which may not exist; tasks are Obsidian Task objects, not objects with tags property)

#### 3. Tech Debt - Debt Metrics (Same as #2)
- **Location**: `Dashboards/Tech Debt.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE with FLATTEN
- **Complexity**: Intermediate
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (same issue as #2)

#### 4. Home - Recent Activity
- **Location**: `Home.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Complexity**: Basic
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Note",
  dateformat(file.mtime, "MM-dd HH:mm") as "Modified"
FROM ""
WHERE file.name != "Home"
SORT file.mtime DESC
LIMIT 8
```
- **Purpose**: Show 8 most recently modified notes
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 5. Home - System Health
- **Location**: `Home.md`
- **Type**: DataviewJS
- **Complexity**: Advanced
- **Code**:
```dataviewjs
const projects = dv.pages('"Projects"').where(p => p.type === "project");
const concepts = dv.pages('"Concepts"');
const snippets = dv.pages('"Snippets"');
const decisions = dv.pages('"Decisions"');

dv.paragraph(`**Projects:** ${projects.length} | **Concepts:** ${concepts.length} | **Snippets:** ${snippets.length} | **ADRs:** ${decisions.length}`);
```
- **Purpose**: Display vault statistics (counts of each major category)
- **Status**: WORKING

### **Task Master Queries (5 queries using Tasks plugin syntax)**

#### 6-10. Task Master - Multiple sections
- **Location**: `Dashboards/Task Master.md`
- **Type**: Obsidian Tasks plugin syntax (NOT Dataview)
- **Complexity**: Basic
- **Queries**:
  1. High Priority (P0)
  2. Architecture Debt (#debt)
  3. Archon tasks
  4. ADK tasks
  5. AgentBench tasks
  6. Neuman Brain tasks
  7. Inbox (unsorted)
- **Example Code**:
```tasks
not done
description includes #P0
sort by created
hide backlink
```
- **Note**: These use the Obsidian Tasks PLUGIN syntax, not Dataview query language
- **Status**: WORKING (different plugin)

### **Query Library - Template Queries (30+ educational queries)**

#### 11-40. Dataview Query Library Reference Queries
- **Location**: `Snippets/Dataview Query Library.md`
- **Type**: Educational templates (not actively used)
- **Complexity**: Basic to Intermediate
- **Categories**:
  - **Project Queries** (4): All projects, Active projects, By priority, Recently updated
  - **Task Queries** (6): All open, Due this week, Overdue, High priority, By project, Completed today
  - **Journal Queries** (3): Recent entries, This month, With tag
  - **Concept Queries** (4): All concepts, Most referenced, Orphans, By tag
  - **Decision Queries** (3): All decisions, Accepted, By project
  - **File Management Queries** (5): Recently modified, Largest, Without tags, Created today, Stale
  - **Snippet Queries** (2): All code snippets, Python only
  - **Calendar Queries** (2): Journal calendar, Due dates calendar
  - **Inline Queries** (4): File info, Metadata, Link count, Days since created
  - **DataviewJS Examples** (3): Project health, Task statistics, Recent activity timeline

- **Status**: Educational reference - mostly WORKING patterns but not deployed in vault

### **Weekly/Monthly Review Templates (8 queries)**

#### 41. Weekly Review - Daily Notes This Week
- **Location**: `Templates/Weekly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Complexity**: Intermediate
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Day",
  length(file.outlinks) as "Links",
  length(file.tasks.where(t => t.completed)) as "Done"
FROM "Journal"
WHERE file.day >= date("<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD", -6) %>") AND file.day <= date("<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>")
SORT file.day ASC
```
- **Purpose**: Show journal entries from past week with link and task counts
- **Status**: WORKING (Templater syntax integrated)

#### 42. Weekly Review - Tasks Completed
- **Location**: `Templates/Weekly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TASK
- **Code**:
```dataview
TASK
FROM "Journal" OR "Projects"
WHERE completed AND completion >= date("<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD", -6) %>")
LIMIT 20
```
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 43. Weekly Review - Tasks Created But Not Completed
- **Location**: `Templates/Weekly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TASK
- **Code**:
```dataview
TASK
FROM ""
WHERE !completed AND created >= date("<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD", -6) %>")
LIMIT 10
```
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 44. Weekly Review - Active Projects Status
- **Location**: `Templates/Weekly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Project",
  status as "Status",
  dateformat(file.mtime, "MM-dd") as "Updated"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project" AND (status = "active" OR status = "alpha")
SORT file.mtime DESC
```
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 45. Monthly Review - Weekly Summaries
- **Location**: `Templates/Monthly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Week",
  length(file.outlinks) as "Links"
FROM "Journal/Weekly"
WHERE file.name contains "<% tp.date.now("YYYY") %>"
SORT file.name DESC
LIMIT 5
```
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (queries `Journal/Weekly` folder which may not exist in the vault structure)

#### 46. Monthly Review - Projects Progress
- **Location**: `Templates/Monthly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE
  status as "Status",
  priority as "Priority"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
SORT priority ASC
```
- **Status**: WORKING

#### 47. Monthly Review - Task Completion
- **Location**: `Templates/Monthly Review.md`
- **Type**: DataviewJS
- **Code**:
```dataviewjs
const tasks = dv.pages('"Journal" OR "Projects"').file.tasks;
const thisMonth = tasks.where(t => t.completion && t.completion.month == <% tp.date.now("M") %> && t.completion.year == <% tp.date.now("YYYY") %>);
dv.paragraph(`Completed tasks this month: **${thisMonth.length}**`);
```
- **Status**: BROKEN (Templater syntax mixed with DataviewJS; file.tasks doesn't work this way)

#### 48. Monthly Review - Notes Created
- **Location**: `Templates/Monthly Review.md`
- **Type**: Dataview LIST
- **Code**:
```dataview
LIST
FROM ""
WHERE file.cday.month = <% tp.date.now("M") %> AND file.cday.year = <% tp.date.now("YYYY") %>
SORT file.cday DESC
LIMIT 10
```
- **Status**: BROKEN (Templater syntax inside Dataview query; cday doesn't support .month property)

### **Concept-Based Queries (3 queries)**

#### 49. RAG - Projects Using RAG
- **Location**: `Concepts/RAG.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE status, description
FROM "Projects"
WHERE contains(tech-stack, [[Concepts/RAG]])
```
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (tech-stack is likely an array property; need different syntax for link contains)

#### 50. Local-First - Projects Using Local-First
- **Location**: `Concepts/Local-First.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE status, description
FROM "Projects"
WHERE contains(tech-stack, [[Local-First]])
```
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (same issue as RAG query)

#### 51. Obsidian Best Practices - Weekly Review Example
- **Location**: `Concepts/Obsidian Best Practices.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE (in documentation)
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Day",
  mood as "Mood",
  energy as "Energy"
FROM "Journal"
WHERE file.day >= date(this.file.name) - dur(7 days)
SORT file.day ASC
```
- **Status**: POTENTIALLY BROKEN (this.file.name is a string; can't subtract duration from it directly)

### **Journal Queries (1 query)**

#### 52. Journal Daily - Linked References
- **Location**: `Journal/2025-12-14.md`
- **Type**: Dataview TABLE
- **Code**:
```dataview
TABLE type, project
FROM "Journal"
WHERE file.day = this.file.day
```
- **Status**: BROKEN (trying to filter by `type` and `project` fields that likely don't exist in journal entries)

---

## PART 2: Query Complexity Assessment

### **Basic Queries (11)** - Single source, simple WHERE
- Active Projects - Recent Activity
- Home - Recent Activity  
- All Dataview reference templates (4 in library)
- Weekly Review - 4 queries
- Query Library - Project queries

### **Intermediate Queries (8)** - Multiple conditions, formatting, FLATTEN
- Project Health Debt Metrics
- Tech Debt query
- Query Library - Task, Concept, Journal queries
- Obsidian Best Practices example
- RAG/Local-First queries

### **Advanced Queries (3)** - DataviewJS with logic
- Home - System Health (working)
- Dataview Library - Project Health Dashboard (example)
- Monthly Review - Task Completion (broken)

---

## PART 3: Broken & Ineffective Queries

| Query | Location | Issue | Severity |
|-------|----------|-------|----------|
| Debt Metrics (x2) | Dashboards | task.tags doesn't exist on task objects | HIGH |
| Weekly Summaries | Monthly Review | Journal/Weekly folder may not exist | MEDIUM |
| Task Completion JS | Monthly Review | Mixed Templater/DataviewJS syntax | HIGH |
| Notes Created | Monthly Review | cday.month syntax invalid | HIGH |
| Linked References | Journal daily | References non-existent fields | MEDIUM |
| RAG Projects | Concepts/RAG | Array link contains syntax incorrect | MEDIUM |
| Local-First Projects | Concepts | Array link contains syntax incorrect | MEDIUM |
| Obsidian Best Practices | Concepts | String to duration math invalid | MEDIUM |

---

## PART 4: Recommendations for New Powerful Queries

### **Priority 1: Implement Effective Dashboards**

1. **Project Velocity Dashboard** - Track changes per project over time
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Project",
  length(filter(file.tasks, t => t.completed)) as "Tasks Done",
  dateformat(file.mtime, "YYYY-MM-dd") as "Last Updated",
  round((date(today) - file.cday).days) as "Days Old"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project"
SORT file.mtime DESC
```

2. **Knowledge Graph - Most Referenced Technologies**
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Concept",
  length(file.inlinks) as "Referenced In",
  length(file.outlinks) as "References"
FROM "Concepts"
WHERE length(file.inlinks) > 0
SORT length(file.inlinks) DESC
```

3. **Tech Stack Distribution** - Which techs used in which projects
```dataviewjs
const projects = dv.pages('"Projects"').where(p => p.type === "project");
const stacks = new Map();

projects.forEach(p => {
  const techs = p["tech-stack"] || [];
  techs.forEach(tech => {
    stacks.set(tech, (stacks.get(tech) || 0) + 1);
  });
});

let table = [["Technology", "Used In # Projects"]];
for (let [tech, count] of stacks.entries()) {
  table.push([tech, count]);
}
dv.table(table);
```

4. **Decisions Impact Tracker** - Link ADRs to projects and show status
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Decision",
  status as "Status",
  dateformat(date, "YYYY-MM-dd") as "Date"
FROM "Decisions"
SORT date DESC
```

### **Priority 2: Advanced Insights**

5. **Stale Project Detection** - Identify projects needing attention
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Project",
  status as "Status",
  round((date(today) - file.mtime).days) as "Days Since Update",
  dateformat(file.mtime, "YYYY-MM-dd") as "Last Modified"
FROM "Projects"
WHERE type = "project" AND (date(today) - file.mtime).days > 14
SORT (date(today) - file.mtime).days DESC
```

6. **Learning Path - Concepts Dependency Graph** (DataviewJS)
```dataviewjs
const concepts = dv.pages('"Concepts"');
const connections = [];

concepts.forEach(concept => {
  const related = concept.file.outlinks || [];
  related.forEach(rel => {
    if (rel.includes("Concepts/")) {
      connections.push([concept.file.link, rel.replace(/.*\//, "").replace(/\[\[|\]\]/g, "")]);
    }
  });
});

if (connections.length > 0) {
  dv.table(["From Concept", "Related To"], connections);
} else {
  dv.paragraph("No concept relationships found");
}
```

7. **Business Venture Dashboard** - Track venture status and stages
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  file.link as "Venture",
  stage as "Stage",
  description as "Description"
FROM "Business/Ventures"
SORT stage DESC
```

### **Priority 3: Operational Queries**

8. **Weekly Standup Report** (DataviewJS - comprehensive)
```dataviewjs
const today = dv.date("today");
const weekAgo = dv.date(today.ts - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);

// Get updated projects
const projects = dv.pages('"Projects"')
  .where(p => p.type === "project" && p.file.mtime > weekAgo.ts);

// Get completed tasks this week
const tasks = dv.pages().file.tasks
  .filter(t => t.completed && t.completion > weekAgo)
  .slice(0, 10);

dv.heading(3, "This Week Summary");
dv.paragraph(`**Projects Updated**: ${projects.length}`);

dv.heading(3, "Recent Activity");
projects.forEach(p => {
  dv.paragraph(`- ${p.file.link} (${Math.round((today - p.file.mtime) / (1000*60*60))} hours ago)`);
});

dv.heading(3, "Completed Tasks");
tasks.forEach(t => {
  dv.paragraph(`- ✅ ${t.text}`);
});
```

9. **Code Quality Scorecard** - Track which projects have:
   - ADRs documented
   - Debt tracked
   - Last updated
   - Test coverage (from external metadata)

10. **Time-to-Completion Metrics** (DataviewJS)
```dataviewjs
const tasks = dv.pages().file.tasks;
const completed = tasks.filter(t => t.completed && t.due && t.completion);

const completionTimes = completed.map(t => ({
  text: t.text,
  daysToComplete: Math.round((t.completion.ts - t.due.ts) / (1000*60*60*24)),
  onTime: t.completion.ts <= t.due.ts ? "✅" : "⚠️"
}));

dv.table(["Task", "Days to Complete", "Status"], completionTimes.map(t => [t.text, t.daysToComplete, t.onTime]));
```

---

## PART 5: Summary & Action Plan

### **Query Inventory**
- **Total Queries Found**: 52
- **Dataview Queries**: 35
- **DataviewJS Queries**: 5
- **Obsidian Tasks Plugin Queries**: 7
- **Template Examples**: 30+

### **Health Status**
- **Working Queries**: 18 (35%)
- **Potentially Broken**: 10 (19%)
- **Educational/Template**: 24 (46%)
